title: What's in the Cards for TE Connectivity's (TEL) Q4 Earnings?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 results are expected to reflect gains from strength across the Industrial, Communication and Transportation segments.

title: Decreased Valuation Makes TE Connectivity Attractive
text: TE Connectivity is a well-diversified $36.75 billion company that deserves coverage here at Seeking Alpha. TE Connectivity is profitable. It also pays dividends.

title: Stealing From the Best: Here Is My Purloined Portfolio
text: A politician would be silly not to do opposition research. A baseball team would be goofy not to use scouting reports.

title: TE Connectivity to report fourth quarter and full year financial results on Nov. 2, 2022
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL) will report financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2022 before trading begins on Nov. 2, 2022.
